untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by book-to-market (BM) ratio and forming decile portfolios based on fundamental accounting ratios (book value of equity / market value of equity). This is a portfolio construction rule based on cross-sectional fundamental data, not a price/technical indicator-based trading rule. The allowed indicator set contains only price, volume, and technical indicators—no fundamental data, accounting metrics, or portfolio-level ranking/decile formation capabilities. Cannot be expressed using permitted indicators (close, sma_*, rsi_*, atr_*, bb_*, macd_*, adx_*, stoch_*, etc.).
translation_notes: This is a value/reversion factor signal requiring book-to-market ratio screening and decile portfolio formation across the cross-section of stocks. It is fundamentally a quantitative portfolio construction strategy, not a single-stock technical trading rule. Backtest engine would need to support: (1) fundamental data fields (book value, market cap), (2) cross-sectional ranking and decile sorting, (3) portfolio-level operations. The placeholder entry/exit conditions using returns are non-functional proxies only.
